description: rajasthan.gov.in is the Government of Rajasthan web domain. Its publicly discoverable developer-facing integration surface is the Forest Stack data platform operated under Forest Department subdomains for dataset discovery and access.
summary: rajasthan.gov.in exposes Forest Stack developer HTTP APIs under forest.rajasthan.gov.in subdomains: a documented control-plane API requiring bearer tokens minted from client credentials, plus a referenced resource-server API whose auth/spec details could not be confirmed from public docs.
